title: multi_version_r5
description: Execution is FHIR-version-agnostic: it navigates the resource JSON and is not coupled to any StructureDefinition. This uses R5-only shapes — MedicationRequest.medication as a CodeableReference (R5 changed it from R4's medication[x] choice) — to show the same engine runs R5 resources unchanged. See https://hl7.org/fhir/R5/medicationrequest.html (medication: CodeableReference) and https://hl7.org/fhir/R5/references.html#CodeableReference.

tests.title: navigates R5 CodeableReference shapes and keys without version coupling
